overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, descending from an elevated walkway into neon-lit streets filled with holographic advertisements and scattered pedestrians. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring heavy rain, reflective wet surfaces, and dense urban architecture with mixed English and Japanese signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with red railings descending to street level

events.description: descends from elevated walkway down stairs to street level

agents.ego_description: walking down a ramp with red railings from an elevated platform toward the street below

entered.detail: red metal railings lining the elevated walkway on the left side
large illuminated billboard featuring a woman's face with purple and pink neon colors
orange and yellow vending machine with illuminated display at the bottom of the stairs
concrete stairs with yellow-black caution stripes leading down to street level

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated walkway with distinctive red railings, descending toward a rain-soaked cyberpunk street below. A large neon billboard with purple and pink hues dominates the view ahead, while an orange vending machine stands at the landing. The camera moves steadily down the stairs, transitioning from the sheltered elevated platform to the exposed street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with neon hotel signs and crosswalk

events.description: approaches yellow-striped crosswalk with traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street toward an intersection, passing under overhead wires with red lanterns

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket standing at the crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: rain-soaked black asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding signs
bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
illuminated sign reading HOTEL with arrow pointing left, mounted on building facade
tall building with vertical KIROSHI signage in white neon letters
string of red paper lanterns hanging from overhead wires across the street

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the camera walks along rain-slicked asphalt toward a crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes. Neon signs illuminate the scene including a prominent HOTEL sign on the left and the KIROSHI building on the right. Red paper lanterns hang from overhead wires, swaying slightly in the rain as the camera approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection crossing with dense neon signage

events.description: begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while following a pedestrian
crosses to the opposite sidewalk and enters a narrower street section with overhead walkways

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while following a muscular man wearing a yellow tank top and headphones

notable_agents.action: man in yellow tank top with headphones walking ahead, leading the way across the street

entered.detail: dark-colored sedan parked along the right curb with brake lights illuminated
red neon sign reading BURGER on the right side of the street
metal pedestrian bridge or overhead structure spanning the street ahead
blue neon sign with Japanese characters and HOテル (Hotel) visible in the distance
establishment with bright yellow illuminated sign reading DRINK & SLICE

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk while following a man in a yellow tank top. After crossing, the scene transitions to a narrower street section with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible ahead. The DRINK & SLICE storefront becomes visible on the right, while various neon signs including a blue HOテル sign illuminate the rainy street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with storefronts and outdoor seating

events.description: passes by the DRINK & SLICE establishment with outdoor seating visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts, approaching the DRINK & SLICE establishment

notable_agents.action: woman in white tank top with cybernetic arm walking toward the camera

entered.detail: blue garbage bags piled near the storefront entrance
red chairs and tables arranged on a raised platform outside the establishment
red metal staircase leading to an upper level of the building

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along a narrower sidewalk with buildings close on both sides. The DRINK & SLICE storefront dominates the right side with its bright yellow signage, outdoor seating, and red staircase. Trash bags sit near the entrance, and various pedestrians including a woman with a cybernetic arm walk past. The overhead structures provide partial shelter from the rain as the camera approaches the establishment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a sheltered elevated walkway into the dense, neon-drenched corridors of a rain-soaked cyberpunk street. It begins by moving down stairs with red railings, passing a purple and pink billboard and an orange vending machine as the camera transitions from the platform to the exposed asphalt below. As the camera reaches street level, the view expands across rain-slicked roads toward a yellow-striped crosswalk, flanked by a hotel sign, the Kiroshi building, and swaying red paper lanterns. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the intersection following a man in a yellow tank top, moving toward a narrower street section where a blue hotel sign and an overhead pedestrian bridge emerge through the rain. Finally, the perspective tightens along a crowded sidewalk, passing pedestrians with cybernetic enhancements before arriving at the bright yellow storefront of Drink & Slice.
